jokes.text: well, this isn't gonna be your mother's sexually transmitted disease awareness fair
jokes.setup: Annie describing elaborate STD fair preparations
jokes.punchline: Subverting 'your mother's [thing]' phrase with STDs
jokes.explanation: Clever subversion of common phrase applied to taboo topic, solid economy

jokes.text: catch knowledge
jokes.punchline: Playing on 'catch disease' vs 'catch knowledge'
jokes.explanation: Excellent wordplay with perfect economy - becomes running gag throughout episode

jokes.text: you stick to quotin' movie lines. i'll stick to sports / i'm trying to reduce my pop-cultural referencing
jokes.setup: Troy challenging Abed's tendency to reference movies
jokes.punchline: Abed's self-aware response about his own character trait
jokes.explanation: Perfect character integration - only Abed would be this meta about his own behavior

jokes.text: 'secretary' is a little degrading to women. i help the dean do officey things
jokes.punchline: Replacing it with equally vague 'officey things'
jokes.explanation: Good structure showing performative political correctness undermined by imprecision

jokes.text: oh, gender saved
jokes.punchline: Jeff's dry response mocking the superficial fix
jokes.explanation: Perfect Jeff line - cynical, economical, and sharp. Great economy with maximum punch

jokes.text: you know the toilets in the women's bathrooms don't have seats, right? / because they keep getting stolen
jokes.punchline: Absurd explanation that they're being stolen
jokes.explanation: Excellent setup/punchline with unexpected absurdist explanation, perfect for Greendale

jokes.text: sabrina, take a note. i want hidden cameras in every stall. problem solved
jokes.punchline: Dean's completely inappropriate surveillance solution
jokes.explanation: Perfect Dean character moment - oblivious to how inappropriate his solutions are

jokes.text: 'you will get aids.' / flip it over. / 'unless you go to the std fair.' / i wrote that
jokes.punchline: Revealed as STD fair marketing, Dean's proud ownership
jokes.explanation: Brilliant subversion - dark fortune becomes marketing, Dean's pride in terrible idea is perfect

jokes.text: congratu-- horrible!
jokes.punchline: Mid-word realization and correction
jokes.explanation: Nice comedic timing with mid-word pivot showing Jeff's horror at realizing what he almost praised

jokes.text: she is super smart, if you know what i mean / unfortunately, i always know what you mean
jokes.setup: Pierce's suggestive comment about girlfriend being 'smart'
jokes.punchline: Jeff's weary acknowledgment of Pierce's transparency
jokes.explanation: Perfect character dynamic - Pierce's crude transparency met with Jeff's exhausted familiarity

jokes.text: when you catch a big fish, you want to stuff her and put her on the mantle
jokes.punchline: Grotesquely inappropriate fish metaphor for girlfriend
jokes.explanation: Quintessentially Pierce - completely inappropriate metaphor delivered with confidence

jokes.text: it's impossible to guard you. your eyes are too gentle and mysterious
jokes.setup: Troy explaining why basketball was fun
jokes.punchline: Abed's unexpectedly poetic/romantic response about Troy's eyes
jokes.explanation: Abed's matter-of-fact delivery of romantic observation about Troy creates perfect comedy

jokes.text: she's an escort. / oh... / some mysteries solve themselves, don't they?
jokes.punchline: Jeff's dry observation about the obviousness
jokes.explanation: Perfect Jeff line with great economy - acknowledges what everyone was thinking

jokes.text: taking a call girl to an std fair. there's a joke here
jokes.setup: Pierce's escort girlfriend going to STD fair
jokes.punchline: Abed's meta acknowledgment that it should be funny but not finishing the joke
jokes.explanation: Brilliant meta-comedy - Abed recognizing the comedic potential but not exploiting it is perfectly in character

jokes.text: is there a pill that makes the word 'no' clearer?
jokes.setup: Pierce pushing Jeff to get a date
jokes.punchline: Jeff's exasperated wish for clearer rejection
jokes.explanation: Great Jeff line - sardonic and relatable, excellent economy of expression

jokes.text: oooohh... / maybe it has something to do with crabs. they're like a food, but they're also a disease
jokes.setup: Group reacting to Pierce's challenge about Jeff dating
jokes.punchline: Troy's innocent attempt to connect food/disease crabs
jokes.explanation: Pure Troy - innocent, childlike observation that misses the point entirely

jokes.text: for all your feather flashing, when was the last time you actually scored? / well, i don't know the precise date, pierce, because i'm not you, so there's no receipt
jokes.setup: Pierce challenging Jeff's actual dating success
jokes.punchline: Jeff's burn implying Pierce pays for sex
jokes.explanation: Excellent burn with clever structure - the 'receipt' punchline is both cutting and economical

jokes.text: 'don't eat the crab dip.' yay-yay!
jokes.punchline: His proud delivery of non-sequitur crab joke
jokes.explanation: Callback to Troy's crab confusion, funny because of his enthusiasm for his weak joke

jokes.text: that's the sound of stds screaming, 'no! stop being so aware of us!'
jokes.setup: Dean hearing setup noise for the fair
jokes.punchline: Personifying STDs as upset about awareness
jokes.explanation: Quintessential Dean absurdism - anthropomorphizing diseases with childlike enthusiasm

jokes.text: what my dad called a jimmy carter
jokes.setup: Dean explaining the anatomical model demonstration
jokes.punchline: His father's euphemism for penis
jokes.explanation: Unexpected euphemism creates humor through specificity and Dean's matter-of-fact delivery

jokes.text: trust me, eyes closed, you can't tell the difference
jokes.setup: Dean reassuring Annie about the model
jokes.punchline: Inappropriate TMI about his personal experience
jokes.explanation: Perfect Dean overshare - completely inappropriate information delivered casually

jokes.text: if i answer now, you'll never learn a valuable lesson about trust, jennifer. crap!
jokes.setup: Jeff trying to sound smooth on phone
jokes.punchline: Revealing he doesn't actually know the girl's name
jokes.explanation: Great structure showing Jeff's attempt at smooth manipulation backfiring immediately

jokes.text: car wash redhead. tube top, r.e.m. concert. juror number six
jokes.punchline: Revealing Jeff's shallow categorization system for women
jokes.explanation: Excellent economy showing Jeff's objectification through specific, absurd descriptors

jokes.text: at least you have 'mommy' in here. / it's not my mom. / dude, not cool
jokes.punchline: Jeff clarifying it's not his mother, Abed's judgment
jokes.explanation: Dark humor with good structure - the implication gets progressively worse

jokes.text: the women literally have no identities. it's pretty shallow
jokes.punchline: Abed's matter-of-fact moral judgment
jokes.explanation: Abed's characteristic blunt observation delivers moral commentary without preaching

jokes.text: real...whatchamacallits... are nothing like bananas! are they?
jokes.punchline: Her earnest question about penis/banana similarity
jokes.explanation: Perfect Annie innocence - her earnest confusion about common euphemism is endearing and funny

jokes.text: you're like a unicorn
jokes.setup: Annie being a virgin in modern times
jokes.punchline: Shirley's mythical creature comparison
jokes.explanation: Good Shirley line - sweet but also highlighting how rare Annie's situation is

jokes.text: we did it to madonna's erotica on the floor of his walk-in closet. but he wouldn't let me look at it. and he cried after. and during. he's gay now. i think he was gay then
jokes.setup: Annie defending that she's not a virgin
jokes.punchline: Increasingly awkward details that make it sound traumatic
jokes.explanation: Excellent escalating structure - each detail makes the experience sound progressively worse and more awkward

jokes.text: harvey keitel's?
jokes.setup: Discussion of where Annie might have seen penises
jokes.punchline: Shirley's specific reference to Harvey Keitel's frequent nudity
jokes.explanation: Unexpected pop culture reference from Shirley, funny because of its specificity and accuracy

jokes.text: we have to break into his office
jokes.punchline: Her immediate jump to criminal solution
jokes.explanation: Perfect Annie - earnest good girl immediately suggesting breaking and entering as reasonable solution

jokes.text: from my experience, they don't last any more than 12, 13 years
jokes.setup: Pierce offering comfort about Jeff's dry spell
jokes.punchline: His absurdly long timeframe revealing his own struggles
jokes.explanation: Excellent Pierce line - attempting to be supportive but revealing his own pathetic situation

jokes.text: oh, no, syphilis. please, please, no, syphilis. ow, it burns! oh, that's gonna hurt
jokes.punchline: Over-the-top dramatic reactions to 'catching' STDs in game
jokes.explanation: Background gag that adds to the absurdity of the STD fair concept

jokes.text: she likes hip-hop and horses. dislikes beards
jokes.punchline: Dean's oddly specific and random list of preferences
jokes.explanation: Random specific details create humor, though feels like setup for Jeff's later lies

jokes.text: can you ever really own a horse?
jokes.setup: Jeff pretending to share Sabrina's horse interest
jokes.punchline: Pseudo-philosophical nonsense about horse ownership
jokes.explanation: Perfect Jeff bullshitting - turning simple question into meaningless philosophy to sound deep

jokes.text: oh, you must have a great personality
jokes.punchline: Backhanded compliment implying Jeff isn't physically attractive enough
jokes.explanation: Classic Pierce insult disguised as compliment - perfectly in character

jokes.text: wow, me in a dune buggy. with syphilis. this is going on the fridge
jokes.setup: Jeff looking at STD fair prize/photo
jokes.punchline: His matter-of-fact acceptance of the absurd souvenir
jokes.explanation: Good deadpan delivery of absurd situation - treating ridiculous photo as normal keepsake

jokes.text: maybe we split up for a little hoo-ha. and then meet in the morning for eggs and...details
jokes.punchline: His crude expectations and desire to share details
jokes.explanation: Typical Pierce inappropriateness - creepy but delivered with innocent enthusiasm

jokes.text: that sounds like the worst combination plate ever
jokes.punchline: Jeff's restaurant metaphor for the disturbing proposal
jokes.explanation: Clever metaphor that captures disgust in food terms - excellent economy and wit

jokes.text: oh, like stallone in over the top. but i'm not sure of all the rules. don't i need a semi truck and a ten-year-old son?
jokes.punchline: Abed's specific movie reference with plot requirements
jokes.explanation: Perfect Abed - turning real situation into movie analysis with specific plot details

jokes.text: you broke my hand, you bastard
jokes.punchline: Troy's dramatic overreaction to losing
jokes.explanation: Standard physical comedy reaction - not particularly clever but fits Troy's dramatic nature

jokes.text: thar she blows
jokes.setup: Shirley looking through keyhole at anatomical model
jokes.punchline: Maritime reference applied to penis viewing
jokes.explanation: Unexpected line from Shirley - good economy and surprising for her character

jokes.text: oh, i had it wroooong! is that considered large?
jokes.setup: Annie finally seeing the anatomical model
jokes.punchline: Her innocent question about size after dramatic realization
jokes.explanation: Perfect Annie innocence - her earnest question after the revelation is endearingly naive

jokes.text: yes. / no.
jokes.punchline: Contradictory responses creating awkward moment
jokes.explanation: Simple but effective contradiction that adds to Annie's confusion and the awkwardness

jokes.text: what in the reverse porky's is going on here?
jokes.setup: Dean discovering women looking at male anatomical model
jokes.punchline: Reference to gender-flipped version of famous movie scene
jokes.explanation: Clever pop culture reference that perfectly captures the gender-swapped voyeurism situation

jokes.text: hey, honey, say caber-net sauv-a-gong-da-nun
jokes.setup: Pierce bragging about Doreen speaking French
jokes.punchline: Completely butchered pronunciation showing his ignorance
jokes.explanation: Perfect Pierce moment - tries to show sophistication but reveals complete ignorance.

jokes.text: he was into s&m and merlot, so we called it s&m&m
jokes.punchline: Clever portmanteau combining kink with candy brand
jokes.explanation: Brilliant wordplay that's both clever and character-appropriate - memorable and quotable

jokes.text: honey, you're boring the crap out of jeff
jokes.punchline: Pierce's oblivious interruption of engaging conversation
jokes.explanation: Perfect Pierce obliviousness - interrupting the most interesting part of the conversation

jokes.text: be right back. i have to make tinkles
jokes.punchline: His childish euphemism for urination
jokes.explanation: Typical Pierce childishness - the kind of thing an old man might say unironically

jokes.text: they're in the shop
jokes.setup: Jeff commenting that she's not wearing go-go boots
jokes.punchline: Matter-of-fact response implying she normally would
jokes.explanation: Perfect deadpan delivery that confirms stereotypes while being witty about it

jokes.text: she thinks that monty python is the evil snake from harry potter
jokes.punchline: Specific example of Sabrina's cultural ignorance
jokes.explanation: Good specific example of ignorance - relatable and revealing about both characters.

jokes.text: that is going to suck. / 'going to,' jeff?
jokes.setup: Jeff commenting on aging men wanting conversation
jokes.punchline: Doreen pointing out he's already there
jokes.explanation: Sharp comeback that turns Jeff's future tense into present reality - excellent structure

jokes.text: she thinks that monty python is the evil snake from harry potter
jokes.punchline: Specific example of Sabrina's pop culture confusion
jokes.explanation: Specific example that shows Sabrina's intellectual limitations in amusing way

jokes.text: i will take 'tinkles' over 'we need to talk' every time
jokes.punchline: Jeff preferring immaturity over emotional depth
jokes.explanation: Excellent callback that shows Jeff's emotional immaturity through specific comparison

jokes.text: you can do better
jokes.punchline: Her blunt assessment delivered matter-of-factly
jokes.explanation: Perfect economy - maximum impact with minimum words, perfectly delivered

jokes.text: is there any lovemaking on the table? / we're through, pierce. but it will cost you 200 bucks
jokes.punchline: Doreen ending relationship but offering professional services
jokes.explanation: Great structure showing the distinction between personal and professional relationships

jokes.text: but it will cost you 200 bucks
jokes.setup: Doreen offering to continue evening platonically
jokes.punchline: Reveals her professional rates even for conversation
jokes.explanation: Great character moment - shows her professionalism extends to all interactions.

jokes.text: a 597? there's a dog-fighting ring in my office?
jokes.punchline: Dean's bizarre interpretation of the code
jokes.explanation: Perfect Dean absurdism - jumping to the most random possible explanation

jokes.text: reverse porky's
jokes.punchline: Callback to earlier reference
jokes.explanation: Good callback that reinforces the absurd situation comparison.

jokes.text: the 'p' word has entered into play
jokes.punchline: Dean's dramatic escalation of language concern
jokes.explanation: Good Dean moment showing his administrative panic over basic anatomy terms.

jokes.text: penis. / she didn't say it
jokes.setup: Group exercise to say 'penis' to remove stigma
jokes.punchline: Immediate noting of Annie's silence
jokes.explanation: Simple observational humor that sets up Annie's character arc in the scene

jokes.text: wow, i really do feel more comfortable saying that now, gail
jokes.punchline: Dean's genuine appreciation for therapeutic breakthrough
jokes.explanation: Good character moment showing Dean's earnest engagement with therapy.

jokes.text: i like being repressed. i am totally comfortable being uncomfortable with my sexuality
jokes.setup: Pressure for Annie to be more open about sexuality
jokes.punchline: Her paradoxical comfort with discomfort
jokes.explanation: Excellent Annie character moment - perfectly paradoxical statement that captures her personality

jokes.text: a giant thumb in a turtleneck. whoop-dee-do!
jokes.setup: Annie's new perspective after seeing anatomical model
jokes.punchline: Her dismissive description deflating male anatomy
jokes.explanation: Brilliant visual metaphor that's both funny and character-perfect - highly quotable

jokes.text: but you're at greendale... and you're old
jokes.setup: Jeff clarifying he's not a professor
jokes.punchline: Sabrina's simple logic equating age + Greendale = professor
jokes.explanation: Shows Sabrina's simple thinking while also hitting Jeff where it hurts about his age

jokes.text: yikers. / yeah, it's pretty much yikers for me too
jokes.setup: Revelation about Jeff being a student
jokes.punchline: Jeff's agreement with her assessment
jokes.explanation: Simple moment showing Jeff's self-awareness about his situation

jokes.text: keep it. / but-- / yeah! yes! yes! how you like those apples?
jokes.setup: Jeff giving up his car to escape situation
jokes.punchline: His immediate celebration of terrible decision
jokes.explanation: Jeff's desperate celebration of escaping at great personal cost shows his priorities

jokes.text: dude, these are leaking. / oh, my god. that's why you don't print things on condoms. everyone's getting preggers, and it's all your fault
jokes.punchline: Realization that printing damaged the condoms
jokes.explanation: Excellent escalation from fun activity to disaster, perfectly logical cause and effect

jokes.text: dean, i am not the best athlete on campus. abed is. i know you let me win the race
jokes.setup: Dean asking Troy to run as best athlete
jokes.punchline: Troy's honest admission about losing to Abed
jokes.explanation: Good character moment showing Troy's growth and honesty about his abilities

jokes.text: that's because... i wanted it to be true
jokes.setup: Abed asking why Troy didn't say anything about losing
jokes.punchline: Troy's honest vulnerability about wanting to be the best
jokes.explanation: Touching character moment that reveals Troy's insecurity while maintaining humor

jokes.text: go, abed, go, before people sex one another!
jokes.setup: Urgent need to warn about faulty condoms
jokes.punchline: Dean's awkward verb usage for sex
jokes.explanation: Perfect Dean line - urgent situation rendered awkward by his verbal choices.

jokes.text: i think this place is sapping my life force
jokes.punchline: Blaming Greendale for his personal growth
jokes.explanation: Jeff's resistance to personal growth expressed through fantasy metaphor

jokes.text: a man reaches a point in his life where he stops looking for a place to hang his underwear and starts looking for a place to hang his hat
jokes.punchline: Unexpectedly mature metaphor about settling down
jokes.explanation: Surprisingly wise metaphor from Pierce, subverting expectations of his usual crudeness

jokes.text: oh, i was waiting for that to become inappropriate or racist
jokes.punchline: Jeff's acknowledgment of Pierce's usual behavior patterns
jokes.explanation: Meta-humor acknowledging Pierce's character patterns while subverting them

jokes.text: so could i borrow 200 bucks? / tell doreen i say hi
jokes.punchline: Immediate return to wanting to pay for sex
jokes.explanation: Perfect structure - builds up Pierce's maturity then immediately deflates it

jokes.text: you know, for 220 i can get the-- / i'll give you 250 if you don't finish telling me
jokes.setup: Pierce starting to describe sexual services
jokes.punchline: Jeff paying him to stop talking
jokes.explanation: Excellent escalation - Jeff paying more to avoid information than Pierce would pay for sex

jokes.text: don't use the condoms! if you're going to have sex tonight, don't use condoms
jokes.setup: Need to warn about faulty condoms
jokes.punchline: Announcement that sounds like encouraging unsafe sex
jokes.explanation: Perfect ironic ending - STD awareness fair concluding with anti-condom announcement. Brilliant structure.
